text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Admirable! I could not be more proud to have her
as a student of our academy!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I expect you to continue these wholehearted
efforts! Ever forward!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's apparently very pleased with the way we're
conducting our practice sessions.
